violations.text: Two freezer units located in the retail area were not in good repair (non-functioning). No food items were observed in units at time of inspection. Establishment has a service request in. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the retail shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
Inspector observed an accumulation of trash and debris around refuse area. Area to be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025

The floors under retail shelves have an accumulation of soil residue, old droppings and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
